name: Helen Carter
text: Genesis Roofing found the leak quickly, explained what had failed and completed the repair without making the job bigger than it needed to be. The photos at the end were genuinely useful.

name: Mark Ellis
text: The re-roof was organised, tidy and much less stressful than expected. We had clear dates, sensible advice on materials and a roof that looks properly finished.

name: Priya Shah
text: Our flat roof had leaked twice before. Genesis checked the falls and edges, not just the surface, and the replacement has handled heavy rain without trouble.

name: Andrew Miles
text: The team replaced old fascias and sorted the gutter run that kept overflowing. The house looks sharper and the rainwater now goes where it should.

name: Rachel Owen
text: A clear explanation of the chimney problem, fair quote and tidy work. The damp patch has dried out and the stack looks much better.

name: Tom Bryant
text: We wanted a roof checked before buying. Genesis gave us a practical list of issues, what was urgent and what could wait.
